differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune myocarditis (e.g., giant cell or sarcoidosis)
next_steps: Perform urgent transthoracic echocardiogram to assess wall motion and pericardial effusion
Obtain cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (cMRI) to evaluate for myocardial inflammation or fibrosis
Test for Lyme serology (IgM/IgG) and consider western blot
Perform continuous Holter monitoring to characterize the conduction system abnormalities
Discontinue herbal supplements (turmeric/liver extract) given elevated liver enzymes
Consult cardiology for potential electrophysiology study if conduction block persists
Monitor liver enzymes and inflammatory markers serially
